items.title: Hapless Chelsea owners have built a monument to chaos and decline
items.description: Chelsea owners BlueCo have built a monument to chaos and decline at Stamford Bridge, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

items.title: 'It's like someone waved a magic wand': Girl, 6, has sight restored by gene therapy
items.description: Saffie's mum says Luxturna therapy at Great Ormond Street has been like "someone waved a magic wand".

items.title: Head coach Liam Rosenior sacked by Chelsea after three months in charge
items.description: Chelsea sack head coach Liam Rosenior after losing five consecutive Premier League matches without scoring for the first time since 1912.

items.title: Keir Starmer v The Civil Service
